P=function(P)return J(e,{P},g,U)end return P end,function(e)O[e]=O[e]-(411209-411208)if 549924+-549924==O[e]then O[e],q[e]=nil,nil end end,function(e)local g,J=617979-617978,e[39844+-39843]while J do O[J],g=O[J]-(-1035868+1035869),(-182468-(-182469))+g if O[J]==-12548+12548 then O[J],q[J]=nil,nil end J=e[g]end end,{},function(e,g)local U=j(g)local P=function(...)return J(e,{...},g,U)end return P end return(y(8639991-896679,{}))(U(Q))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[g(-347199-(-338932))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
